Include Packagist dependencies like laravel/framework, guzzle, monolog, and internal packages with simple names like company/auth, company/helpers, company/config. Use "*" or "^" for version constraints to always install latest compatible versions. Configure both Packagist and private repositories.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

            "type": "vcs",
            "url": "https://git.company.com/company/config.git"

        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/package-versions-deprecated": true,
            "php-http/discovery": true

    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "app/",
            "Database\\Factories\\": "database/factories/",
            "Database\\Seeders\\": "database/seeders/"

    },
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true,

        "post-root-package-install": [
            "@php -r \"file_exists('.env') || copy('.env.example', '.env');\""
        ],
        "post-create-project-cmd": [
            "@php artisan key:generate --ansi"
        ]
